rows.label: tev072101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about Yun'tonam's time with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Yun'tonam if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Yun'tonam about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Yun'tonam about the xenoforms captured by the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Yun'tonam about the xenoforms captured by the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Yun'tonam if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Within the Growth, the powerful
rise to the top. So we Orphe were
treated as the lowest of the low.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0002
rows.name:
We were ordered to develop new weapons
one after another. Any attempt to
rest was punished with torture.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Under such harsh treatment, my
companions were dying by the day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0004
rows.name:
The only ones who managed to survive
were the five Orpheans you rescued.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I never want to return to that
place again. Please, you must
protect us from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Whenever I close my eyes, I can see a
vivid image of our homeland. This has
been passed down through my Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It is a city shaded by deep green trees that
rustle in a gentle, unceasing wind. Simply
being there seems to fill one with vitality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0012
rows.name:
How can I compare such a place to this
treeless city of dull concrete houses?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I feel like we've been locked
away in some prison. I need to
speak to our botanist, Mon'barac.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Perhaps there is some way he can
increase the tree cover and make
this city more livable for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0019
rows.name:
When we were being held by the Growth,
I met Larsians on multiple occasions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0020
rows.name:
They were completely different
from the Growth soldiers that
had been tormenting us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0021
rows.name:
One of our people collapsed from
exhaustion while he was repairing
the Vasara—one of their Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0022
rows.name:
But rather than rebuking him, the Larsian
carried the Orphean who had collapsed
someplace out of sight so that he could rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0023
rows.name:
The kindness they show to those weaker
than themselves is something that they
seem to have in common with you humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0028
rows.name:
We were not the only species of xenoform
that had been taken from their home planet
and forced to accompany the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0029
rows.name:
With Luxaar gone, I worry what his desperate
underlings might do to the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Have you considered traveling to
each region to free the xenoforms
being held captive there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0031
rows.name:
I imagine that, like us, they could
be a great help in your efforts to
make new lives for yourselves here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0036
rows.name:
The Growth have been destroyed,
and most of their captive xenoforms
have taken refuge in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0037
rows.name:
I must admit that I still have
difficulty understanding the way
beings who are devoid of Ovah think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Yet as residents of this city,
we hope to learn to better
understand our alien brethren.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hopefully we can live together in a symbiotic
fashion, forming an alliance quite different
from the way the Growth operated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1001
rows.name:
When we were being held by the Growth,
I met Larsians on multiple occasions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1002
rows.name:
They were completely different
from the Growth soldiers that
had been tormenting us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1003
rows.name:
One of our people collapsed from
exhaustion while he was repairing
the Vasara—one of their Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1004
rows.name:
But rather than rebuking him, the Larsian
carried the Orphean who had collapsed
someplace out of sight so that he could rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1005
rows.name:
Perhaps these Bias could stand
to learn something from the
kindness of the Larsian people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1010
rows.name:
I wonder how much longer
I must stay like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1011
rows.name:
To be so savagely punished just
for eating a tree! These Bias are
truly terrifying creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1012
rows.name:
I can only hope that our botanist, Mon'barac,
will soon be able to transform NLA into a place
where we can freely eat whatever trees we like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1016
rows.name:
The Growth have been destroyed,
and most of their captive xenoforms
have taken refuge in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1017
rows.name:
Now we all must combine our
talents in order to find a way
to survive on this cruel world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1018
rows.name:
I hope these Bias are able
to understand that as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072101_MSG1019
rows.name:
We have such difficulty understanding
each other. It's as if we simply
do not mesh at all.[ST:wait ]
